hooks.command: STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE=$(cat | jq -r '.stop_hook_active'); if [ "$STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; output=$(bun x ultracite check 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; fi
STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE=$(cat | jq -r '.stop_hook_active'); if [ "$STOP_HOOK_ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; output=$(bun turbo typecheck 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; fi
